title: Update path: stamp records framework version; update command re-stamps invariants and reports drift
description: Stamping records the framework version in the Instance. An update command (the Scaffolder's second verb) re-stamps only the invariant layout at the installed package's version: variant files (the grill's project-specific outputs) and work-tracking state are never touched; invariant files that drifted locally from their stamped form are reported, not overwritten. Demoable: stamp a scratch Instance at the previous version, run update, observe invariants refreshed, variants intact, drift reported.
acceptance_criteria: A stamped Instance records the framework version that stamped it
The update command refreshes invariant files to the installed version and never modifies variant files or work-tracking state
Locally drifted invariant files are reported and left in place
package-qa passes on the stamp contract
fix: framework-version.json marker on init + update verb (re-stamps invariants, drift persists via template-hash anchor, restores missing); stamp-policy.js data module; code-standards PASS, package-qa PASS.
